findings.issue: refreshApps always loads fixture data regardless of mode, making live-smoke mode identical to fixture.
findings.fix: In ingest.js, branch on mode to call live adapters when mode is 'live-smoke' and fall back to fixture on failure.

findings.issue: No evidence of Qlty or Promptfoo gates being executed; spec requires recording their absence.
findings.fix: Add a pre-test script that checks for Qlty/Promptfoo, logs warnings if missing, and exits 0 to keep the spike moving.

suggested_next_steps: Wire live-smoke mode to Apple/Apify adapters with fixture fallback.
Add Qlty/Promptfoo presence checks and record warnings in CI output.
Add a test for the /api/apps/:id endpoint and the POST /api/refresh endpoint.
